headline: Tesla's Elon Musk Recently Pledged A Huge Donation To Donald Trump, And The Ex-President Returned The Favor By Criticizing EVs At The RNC
summary: Former President Donald Trump has been accused of betraying Tesla CEO Elon Musk, despite receiving a $180 million donation from Musk for his campaign.

headline: CrowdStrike Issues Statement Following Massive Outage That Stemmed From Content Update For Windows Hosts: 'This Was Not A Cyberattack'
summary: CrowdStrike issues statement following widespread outage stemming from Microsoft update, confirms incident not a cyberattack.

headline: Trump Pours Cold Water On Industry, Tesla Falls Ahead Of Earnings Week, Ford's Step-back In EV Plans And More: Biggest EV Stories Of The Week
summary: Even as EV companies struggle to find a footing, they could be in for more trouble amid the developments on the geopolitical front.

headline: Microsoft Outage, CrowdStrike Share Decline Hits Nancy Pelosi's, Marjorie Taylor Greene's Wealth: Here's How Much Congress Members Lost
summary: CrowdStrike shares fell on Friday due to their role in the Microsoft outage. Here's a look at how much Nancy Pelosi and Marjorie Taylor Green lost on their CRWD stakes.

headline: Benzinga Bulls And Bears: Nvidia, Tesla, CrowdStrike, Meta And Crypto Trader Sees Dogecoin Pattern Leading To All-Time High
summary: Benzinga examined the prospects for many investors’ favorite stocks over the last week — here’s a look at some of our top stories.

headline: Elon Musk Says Tesla Deleted CrowdStrike From Its Systems But Was Not Untouched By Global IT Outage: 'Unfortunately, Many Of Our Suppliers...Use It'
summary: Tesla CEO Elon Musk on Friday said that the EV company was affected by the recent global IT outage which gave a 'seizure' to the automotive supply chain.

headline: Tesla CEO Elon Musk Blasts Satya Nadella After Microsoft-CrowdStrike Issue Takes Down Millions Of Computers Globally: 'This Gave A Seizure To The Automotive Supply Chain'
summary: Tesla CEO Elon Musk slammed Microsoft's Satya Nadella following the massive IT outage caused by a faulty update pushed out by CrowdStrike.

headline: Microsoft-CrowdStrike Issue Caused 'Largest IT Outage In History,' Showing How Much We Depend On A Handful Of Companies
summary: Microsoft-CrowdStrike incident caused largest IT outage in history, affecting computers and cloud services worldwide. Raises concerns about reliance on few companies.

headline: Billionaire Richard Branson Once Tried Taking On Coca-Cola, Which Turned Out To Be His 'Most Notable Failure:' He Says It Taught Him That People 'Quite Like The Underdog'
summary: Billionaire entrepreneur Richard Branson disclosed his most significant business failure- Virgin Cola- and the crucial lesson it imparted in a recent podcast.

headline: FTC Criticizes Microsoft Over Xbox Game Pass Price Increase And 'Degraded' Standard Tier (Updated)
summary: The FTC has expressed its disapproval of Microsoft's decision to raise the prices for Xbox Game Pass and introduce a new "degraded" standard tier.
